# Solver calibration fixtures

Placeholder so this directory is tracked by git.

Task 10 of the surrogate-solver build
(`docs/superpowers/plans/2026-06-12-surrogate-solver-v1.md`) freezes the
PERMANENT set of five solver-level calibration fixtures here. The §1.5 / §9
n>=5 calibration gate (Task 11) runs the production `solve_coloring` over the
artifacts placed in this directory.

(The plan originally specified a `.gitkeep` marker here, but the repo's
pre-commit hook forbids committing `.gitkeep` files; this README serves the
same dir-tracking purpose.)
